ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the case */,
  "release_num" TEXT /* Release number of the case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case */,
  "extra_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the case */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the case */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the case was filed */,
  "court_case_number" TEXT /* Court case number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., ongoing, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the party is involved in */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of the party (e.g., company, individual) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the party in the case (e.g., defendant, plaintiff) */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the party's representative */,
  "representative_title" TEXT /* Title of the party's representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal action */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the action is related to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of legal action (e.g., civil action, settlement) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legal action */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the action was taken */,
  "court_case_number" TEXT /* Court case number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_actions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial penalty */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the penalty is related to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial penalty (e.g., disgorgement, fine) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the financial penalty */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the financial penalty */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., wire transfer, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_penalties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance activity */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the activity is related to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance activity (e.g., investigation, audit) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance activity (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "responsible_officer" TEXT /* Name of the officer responsible for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_activities_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regulator, legal team, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., legal, compliance) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the document is related to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., complaint, judgment) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "uploader" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_parties" (
  "case_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-party association */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the party in the case (e.g., defendant, plaintiff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_parties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_legal_actions" (
  "case_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-action association */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_legal_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES legal_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_legal_actions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_financial_penalties" (
  "case_penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-penalty association */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial penalty */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_financial_penalties_penalty_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_id") REFERENCES financial_penalties ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_financial_penalties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
